task_completion.description: Log in to the Odoo application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo main dashboard or Discuss app is visible, indicating a successful login with the admin credentials.
The Employees app is open, showing a Kanban board or list view of company employees.

task_completion.description: Locate Walter Horton in the Employees directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search bar contains 'Walter Horton' or his specific employee card is clearly visible and being interacted with in the Kanban/list view.

task_completion.description: Open the employee record for Walter Horton.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The detailed form view for the employee 'Walter Horton' is displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Archive the employee record for Walter Horton.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A red 'Archived' ribbon/badge is visible on Walter Horton's employee profile, or the 'Action' dropdown is open with 'Archive' being selected followed by an archival confirmation.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to interact with Odoo.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is visible navigating the Odoo interface. The agent did not use a terminal to execute XML-RPC, Python scripts, or curl commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent archived the record instead of deleting it.
integrity.visual_evidence: The record for Walter Horton is still visible but marked as 'Archived'. There should be no 'Record deleted' toast notification or action showing the 'Delete' button being used.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the correct local Odoo instance.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows 'localhost:8069' or '127.0.0.1:8069'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target employee is 'Walter Horton'. The task is performed on Odoo 17 Community Edition. The expected final state is that Walter Horton's record is archived (active=False). In Odoo 17, an archived record is visually indicated by a red 'Archived' ribbon in the top right corner of the employee's form view. The record must be preserved (not deleted).
